name: JangWonTech Co., Ltd.
summary: JangWonTech Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells mobile phone, IT, and automotive components in South Korea, Vietnam, and internationally. The company offers built-in brackets for smartphones and tablets, and smartphone exterior parts; automotive components, such as car engine parts, smart key exterior parts, and automotive ECU cases; head lamp heat sink for SUVs and passenger cars, and heat sinks for audio products; portable infrared cameras, telescopic lens barrels, audio front panels, amplifier cases, etc.; and precision press parts. It also provides communication parts, including antenna and repeater parts; automotive body parts, frying pans, telephoto lens, and inline parts; UV/urethane coating, MFC, metal painting, and encoating solutions; medical instruments consisting of parts for portable X-ray detectors and portable ultrasonic diagnostic equipment parts; and camera parts. JangWonTech Co., Ltd. was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Gumi-si, South Korea.
